entries.zh: 完成内置版本更新中心：新增后端版本查询与手动检查接口，首页横幅和设置页均可展示当前版本、最新版本和发布说明。
entries.en: Completed the built-in update center with backend version/check endpoints plus dashboard and Settings UI for current/latest versions and release notes.

entries.zh: 新增浏览器注册引擎：注册任务可在协议/浏览器两种方式间选择；浏览器模式通过 Chromium、Turnstile 扩展与预检完成注册，成功结果会经过 SSO、OAuth、spool 导入和首次同步验证。
entries.en: Added a browser registration engine with protocol/browser selection. Browser mode uses Chromium, the Turnstile extension, and preflight checks; a success is verified through SSO, OAuth, spool import, and initial sync.

entries.zh: 账号巡检启动前会重新读取可用模型；后端区分模型不可用、参数无效和任务冲突，避免使用过期模型路由导致失败。
entries.en: Account inspection now refreshes available models before starting and distinguishes unavailable models, invalid input, and active-task conflicts.

entries.zh: 修复 Grok Web 浏览器 worker 在页面水合、遮罩或元素失效时发送按钮偶发无法点击的问题，增加可见性检测、重试和 JavaScript 回退。
entries.en: Fixed intermittent Grok Web browser-worker send failures during hydration, overlays, or stale elements with visibility checks, retries, and a JavaScript fallback.

entries.zh: 修复 TLS 出口响应 Trailer 延迟填充丢失，以及 Web Provider 错误响应缺少 Request 时可能触发空指针的问题。
entries.en: Fixed deferred TLS egress trailer propagation and prevented a nil request panic when building Web Provider error response URLs.

entries.zh: 改进本地媒体临时文件清理：失败时保留已提交图片、再次尝试清理并记录可诊断日志。
entries.en: Improved local-media temporary-file cleanup by preserving committed images, retrying cleanup, and logging actionable failures.

entries.zh: 修复不安全 HTTP 环境下复制失败的问题，并修复客户端密钥再次查看时未显示实际密钥的界面问题。
entries.en: Fixed clipboard fallback in insecure HTTP contexts and restored the actual client key value when viewing a created key again.

entries.zh: 升级 quic-go 与 pgx 到官方修复版本，消除 HTTP/3 QPACK 内存耗尽和 PostgreSQL 占位符 SQL 注入风险。
entries.en: Updated quic-go and pgx to patched releases, eliminating the HTTP/3 QPACK memory exhaustion and PostgreSQL placeholder SQL injection risks.

entries.zh: SSO、注册账号和协议账本改为原子私有写入，目录权限为 0700，凭据文件权限为 0600。
entries.en: SSO, browser-registration, and protocol-registration credentials now use atomic private writes with 0700 directories and 0600 files.

entries.zh: 完善版本检查共享请求的取消隔离、前端中英文错误提示和发布信息展示，降低网络波动或旧数据造成的误报。
entries.en: Improved cancellation isolation for shared version checks plus Chinese/English error messaging and release display to reduce false failures from network or stale data.

entries.zh: 代理节点列表新增启用/停用开关，可直接快速控制节点是否参与路由。
entries.en: Added an enable/disable switch to the egress-node list for quickly controlling whether a node participates in routing.

entries.zh: 新增代理分组左侧导航、代理节点与代理组管理，并支持为模型路由绑定或清除代理组。
entries.en: Added proxy-group navigation, proxy node and group management, plus model-route binding and clearing.

entries.zh: Build、Web、Console、图片和视频请求支持按代理组路由，并增加注册代理组 scope 校验与 fallback。
entries.en: Added proxy-group routing for Build, Web, Console, image, and video requests, with registration scope validation and fallback handling.

entries.zh: 完善代理组与成员并发限制；Redis 运行时使用分布式租约，跨实例共享容量并避免共享节点被重复限流。
entries.en: Improved group and member concurrency limits; Redis runtime now uses distributed leases to share capacity across instances without double-limiting shared nodes.

entries.zh: 删除代理组时自动解绑模型路由，修复 Console、图片下载和 WebSocket 生图的代理 scope 反馈。
entries.en: Deleting a proxy group now unbinds model routes automatically; fixed proxy-scope feedback for Console, image downloads, and WebSocket image generation.

entries.zh: 调整 Docker、Compose 和清障服务部署配置，补充生产部署示例与稳定性检查。
entries.en: Adjusted Docker, Compose, and clearance-service deployment configuration, with production examples and stability checks.

entries.zh: 修复版本更新清单包含界面类型说明时无法解析，导致版本信息和更新说明不显示的问题。
entries.en: Fixed release information disappearing when the manifest contained interface-style entries.

entries.zh: Grok Web 账号状态栏新增“未开启 NSFW”快速筛选，可直接查看需要开启 NSFW 的账号。
entries.en: Added a 'NSFW disabled' quick filter to the Grok Web account status bar.

entries.zh: 修复 Web 注册自动开启 NSFW 容易漏开的默认状态；切换到 Web 注册时默认勾选，切换到 Build 时自动关闭。
entries.en: Fixed the Web registration NSFW option being easy to miss by enabling it by default for Web and disabling it for Build.

entries.zh: Web 注册任务新增“注册完成后开启 NSFW”开关，开启后会在账号导入并首次同步成功后自动设置。
entries.en: Added an 'Enable NSFW after registration' option for Web registration tasks, applied after account import and initial sync succeed.

entries.zh: 自动开启 NSFW 失败时，注册结果会明确标记为失败并记录成功、失败数量。
entries.en: Registration results now explicitly report NSFW setup failures with succeeded and failed counts.

entries.zh: 账号管理新增 Grok Web 账号级 NSFW 开启/关闭、批量操作、状态标签和快速筛选。
entries.en: Added account-level NSFW controls for Grok Web accounts, including bulk actions, status labels, and quick filtering.

entries.zh: 新增导入账号后自动开启 NSFW 的能力。
entries.en: Added automatic NSFW enablement after account import.

entries.zh: 媒体管理新增本地图片缓存统计、文件列表、单文件删除和全部清空。
entries.en: Added local image cache statistics, file listing, individual deletion, and full clearing to media management.

entries.zh: 修复 NSFW gRPC-Web 空成功响应被误判为失败的问题。
entries.en: Fixed empty successful NSFW gRPC-Web responses being incorrectly treated as failures.

entries.zh: 优化账号状态筛选条和 NSFW 快速筛选布局。
entries.en: Improved the account status filter bar and NSFW quick-filter layout.

entries.zh: 修复 Grok Web 生图与对话调度：模糊 429 保留真实额度并短暂冷却换号，只有上游明确确认耗尽时才标记对应额度窗口。
entries.en: Fixed Grok Web image and chat scheduling so ambiguous 429 responses preserve quota and retry another account, while only confirmed exhaustion marks the relevant quota window.

entries.zh: 账号管理新增按当前筛选结果全选、反选和清空选择，并补齐 Web 额度耗尽状态展示。
entries.en: Added filtered select-all, invert, and clear-selection actions to account management, plus accurate Web quota exhaustion status.

entries.zh: 修复协议注册代理预检与 worker 参数传递，支持直连、显式代理和系统代理解析，并返回具体失败检查项。
entries.en: Fixed protocol registration proxy preflight and worker argument propagation for direct, explicit, and system proxy modes, with actionable failed-check details.

entries.zh: 补齐注册代理、Turnstile Solver 和服务器发布目录的 Compose 配置与部署说明。
entries.en: Completed Compose configuration and deployment guidance for registration proxies, the Turnstile solver, and server release directories.

entries.zh: 新增版本更新入口、可滚动版本历史、更新状态圆点和自动提醒。
entries.en: Added the version center, scrollable release history, update indicator, and automatic reminders.

entries.zh: 版本信息由构建时 VERSION 注入，并从 GitHub manifest 检查最新版本。
entries.en: Injects the current VERSION at build time and checks the latest GitHub manifest.

entries.zh: 修复协议注册在 Docker 与服务器环境中的 Solver、代理和预检配置。
entries.en: Fixed Solver, proxy, and preflight settings for protocol registration in Docker and server deployments.

entries.zh: spool 文件增加跨进程原子认领，避免多个实例重复导入同一凭据。
entries.en: Added cross-process atomic spool claims to prevent duplicate credential imports.

entries.zh: 失败凭据支持定时清理，服务器发布目录、数据目录和注册网络配置改为稳定参数。
entries.en: Added failed-credential retention and stable server paths and registration network settings.

entries.zh: 发布 Grok2API v3 管理后台、注册任务、聊天工作区和媒体管理能力。
entries.en: Released the Grok2API v3 console, registration tasks, chat workspace, and media management.
